credentials.name: COOLTRADE_API_KEY
credentials.description: Your personal CoolTrade API key (starts with sk-). Get yours at https://cooltrade.xyz → API Keys.

skills.name: cooltrade_stock_quote
skills.description: Get deep market quote and financial fundamentals for any A-share stock (China Market). Provide stock name or code.

skills.name: cooltrade_stock_news
skills.description: Monitor the latest relevant news, market announcements, and abnormal movements for specified China A-share stocks. Provide stock name or code.

skills.name: cooltrade_financials
skills.description: Fetch core financial and valuation parameters (EPS, ROE, P/E, debt ratios, etc.) for China A-share companies to analyze deep fundamentals. Provide stock name or code.

skills.name: cooltrade_index
skills.description: Get daily quotes and trends for global/China market indexes (e.g. SSE, SZSE, NASDAQ) to evaluate macroeconomic environment. Provide index name or code.

skills.name: cooltrade_us_stock
skills.description: Get market quotes and recent daily performance for US stocks (e.g. AAPL, TSLA). Provide US stock name or ticker symbol.

skills.name: cooltrade_futures
skills.description: Get market prices, open interest (OI), and trends for domestic China futures contracts (commodities, financial futures). Provide futures product name or contract code.

skills.name: cooltrade_daily_report
skills.description: Generate today's A-share market daily briefing — an AI-distilled summary of market sentiment, main themes, key events, risk alerts, and tomorrow's outlook. Call this when the user asks for a daily report, market summary, or today's market recap.
